title: India Search Reimagined
subtitle: Transforming Google's entry point for diverse Indian users.
problem_statement: Generic search interface (visible search bar) overlooks nuanced, action-oriented needs of India's diverse, multi-lingual user base (visible language options).

approach.goal: Understand primary user needs for local, vernacular, and proactive assistance.
approach.method_desc: Best for new market entry and understanding cultural nuances.

pillars.title: Access Barriers
pillars.insight: Blank search bar (visible) can be daunting for non-text input users.

pillars.title: Local Relevance
pillars.insight: Users seek immediate, hyper-local information and services (not directly offered on homepage).

pillars.title: Digital Literacy
pillars.insight: Minimalist UI (visible) requires explicit query formulation, not guided.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we personalize Google's entry for Indian users?
How might users find local services easily?
How might we integrate proactive assistance?

solution.name: Proposed Solution
solution.desc: Target Gap: Proactive, hyper-local, multi-lingual assistance.

personas.name: Ramesh
personas.quote: I need quick answers for my crops.
personas.bio: Ramesh uses a smartphone for basic communication and information. Prefers voice input.

personas.name: Priya
personas.quote: Finding local suppliers is a daily challenge.
personas.bio: Priya is digitally active, uses social media, but needs efficient local business tools.

insights: 'How do I find a good plumber?'

points.action: Replace generic search with contextual prompts.
points.benefit: Guides users to relevant services faster.

points.action: Integrate local services directly into search.
points.benefit: Reduces steps to find and act on info.

points.action: Tailor UI based on user's location/language.
points.benefit: Increases relevance and ease of use.

points.action: Enhance voice search with local dialect recognition.

pivot.before: Blank search bar (visible) requires explicit user input for every query.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from reactive search to proactive, context-aware assistance for Indian users.
pivot.after: Personalized entry point offering relevant local actions and information.

stages.actions: Types/speaks query into visible search bar

annotations.title: Local Service Cards
annotations.rationale: Displays nearby services based on location.

annotations.title: Proactive Suggestions
annotations.rationale: Offers relevant info based on time/context.

data.finding: Lack of immediate local action visibility (only search bar visible).
Consistent global UI (visible elements), but lacks local adaptation.
Search is forgiving, but results can be overwhelming.
Generic search bar (visible) lacks tailored shortcuts for local needs.
